name: Cavalucci Di Italia
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the sugar and hot water together until the syrup forms a thread.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the chopped walnuts, spices (nutmeg, cinnamon, ground cloves), and candied orange peel.
3. Gradually add the flour and knead into a smooth dough.
4. Roll out thinly on a floured surface.
5. Cut into small squares or round shapes.
6. Bake at 350°F until light brown, 8-12 minutes.
